requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety Certification — Heat Pump Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全认证——热泵设备
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全認證——熱泵設備

summary.en: Canadian market access for electrical heat pump equipment is controlled through provincial and territorial electrical safety laws and codes, generally requiring certification or field evaluation by a certification body accredited by the Standards Council of Canada. CSA C22.2 No. 236 for heating and cooling equipment and CSA C22.2 No. 120 for refrigeration equipment are Canadian standard routes used by accredited certification bodies; the mandatory obligation is the applicable Canadian electrical safety law/code and accepted certification mark, not the CSA standard alone.
summary.zh: 加拿大电气热泵设备的市场准入由省和地区电气安全法律及规范控制，通常要求由加拿大标准委员会认可的认证机构进行认证或现场评估。CSA C22.2 No. 236（供暖和制冷设备）及CSA C22.2 No. 120（制冷设备）是认可认证机构使用的加拿大标准路径；强制性义务是适用的加拿大电气安全法律/规范和被接受的认证标志，而非CSA标准本身。
summary.zht: 加拿大電氣熱泵設備的市場准入由省和地區電氣安全法律及規範控制，通常要求由加拿大標準委員會認可的認證機構進行認證或現場評估。CSA C22.2 No. 236（供暖和制冷設備）及CSA C22.2 No. 120（制冷設備）是認可認證機構使用的加拿大標準路徑；強制性義務是適用的加拿大電氣安全法律/規範和被接受的認證標誌，而非CSA標準本身。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial electrical safety legislation and codes

summary.en: China CCC certification and GB 4706.32 testing address Chinese domestic electrical safety requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers. CCC marks and Chinese test reports are not accepted as Canadian electrical approval marks unless an SCC-accredited certification body has evaluated and listed the product for Canada.
summary.zh: 中国CCC认证和GB 4706.32测试用于满足中国国内热泵、空调器和除湿机的电气安全要求。除非经SCC认可认证机构按加拿大要求评估并列名，CCC标志和中国测试报告不被接受为加拿大电气批准标志。
summary.zht: 中國CCC認證和GB 4706.32測試用於滿足中國國內熱泵、空調器和除濕機的電氣安全要求。除非經SCC認可認證機構按加拿大要求評估並列名，CCC標誌和中國測試報告不被接受為加拿大電氣批准標誌。

gap.en: Canadian certification normally requires construction review, component traceability, Canadian deviations, bilingual markings where required, factory follow-up, and an accepted Canadian certification mark. Chinese CCC files can help the technical review but do not replace SCC-accredited certification or field evaluation.
gap.zh: 加拿大认证通常要求结构审查、零部件可追溯性、加拿大差异要求、必要的双语标识、工厂跟踪检查以及被接受的加拿大认证标志。中国CCC文件可辅助技术审查，但不能替代SCC认可认证或现场评估。
gap.zht: 加拿大認證通常要求結構審查、零部件可追溯性、加拿大差異要求、必要的雙語標識、工廠跟蹤檢查以及被接受的加拿大認證標誌。中國CCC文件可輔助技術審查，但不能替代SCC認可認證或現場評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under applicable provincial/territorial electrical safety law or code; CSA C22.2 No. 236 and CSA C22.2 No. 120 are certification-standard routes used by accredited bodies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC for applicable Chinese domestic electrical appliance categories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — obtain Canadian electrical certification or accepted field evaluation; CCC and GB 4706.32 evidence is not sufficient for Canada.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——需取得加拿大电气认证或被接受的现场评估；CCC和GB 4706.32证据不足以满足加拿大要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——需取得加拿大電氣認證或被接受的現場評估；CCC和GB 4706.32證據不足以滿足加拿大要求。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigeration Equipment Safety — CSA C22.2 No. 120 Route
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷设备安全——CSA C22.2 No. 120路径
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷設備安全——CSA C22.2 No. 120路徑

summary.en: Where the heat pump configuration is evaluated as refrigeration equipment or contains refrigeration assemblies within the certification scope, accredited certification bodies may apply CSA C22.2 No. 120 in addition to, or instead of, other Canadian appliance standards. The mandatory obligation remains Canadian electrical approval under the applicable code authority; the standard is a technical certification route.
summary.zh: 当热泵配置被评估为制冷设备，或在认证范围内包含制冷组件时，认可认证机构可适用CSA C22.2 No. 120，并可能同时适用或替代其他加拿大电器标准。强制性义务仍是适用规范主管机构下的加拿大电气批准；该标准是技术认证路径。
summary.zht: 當熱泵配置被評估為制冷設備，或在認證範圍內包含制冷組件時，認可認證機構可適用CSA C22.2 No. 120，並可能同時適用或替代其他加拿大電器標準。強制性義務仍是適用規範主管機構下的加拿大電氣批准；該標準是技術認證路徑。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial electrical safety legislation and codes

summary.en: Chinese refrigeration-safety and appliance-safety files may reference GB/T 9237, GB 4706.32, component CCC marks, and factory quality files. These do not determine the Canadian certification scope or the applicable Canadian standard selection.
summary.zh: 中国制冷安全和电器安全文件可能引用GB/T 9237、GB 4706.32、零部件CCC标志和工厂质量文件。这些文件不能决定加拿大认证范围或适用加拿大标准的选择。
summary.zht: 中國制冷安全和電器安全文件可能引用GB/T 9237、GB 4706.32、零部件CCC標誌和工廠質量文件。這些文件不能決定加拿大認證範圍或適用加拿大標準的選擇。

gap.en: The Canadian certification body must classify the product and choose the applicable Canadian standard set. Refrigerant controls, compressor protection, abnormal operation, enclosure, wiring, and marking requirements may need design changes even when the Chinese product is CCC-certified.
gap.zh: 加拿大认证机构必须对产品分类并选择适用的加拿大标准组合。即使中国产品已获CCC认证，制冷剂控制、压缩机保护、异常运行、外壳、布线和标识要求仍可能需要设计变更。
gap.zht: 加拿大認證機構必須對產品分類並選擇適用的加拿大標準組合。即使中國產品已獲CCC認證，制冷劑控制、壓縮機保護、異常運行、外殼、佈線和標識要求仍可能需要設計變更。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory electrical approval under the applicable Canadian code authority; CSA C22.2 No. 120 is a technical route when selected by the certification body
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC or GB-based domestic approval only where China scope applies

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — the Canadian certification scope and selected CSA C22.2 route must be confirmed by an SCC-accredited body; Chinese refrigeration files are supporting evidence only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——加拿大认证范围和所选CSA C22.2路径必须由SCC认可机构确认；中国制冷文件仅为支持性证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——加拿大認證範圍和所選CSA C22.2路徑必須由SCC認可機構確認；中國制冷文件僅為支持性證據。
